modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log clinical hours in CORE ELMS.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to log my clinical hours.  
I can't find the option to log hours.  
The video shows it in the top right corner, but I don't see it.  
I need help with this issue.
short_description: Unable to log clinical hours in CORE ELMS.
